case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. GABBY'S AUTO, L.L.C. et al

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $430.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT GABBY'S AUTO, L.L.C. GABIANELLI JR, RICHARD A
DECLARATION MARK SCHICKENDANTZ FILED RE: EQUIPMENT VALUATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-26-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION ANSON LOUIE FILED RE: COPIES MADE AS BUSINESS RECORD (EVID CODE 1521, 1550) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GABBY'S AUTO, L.L.C. GABIANELLI JR, RICHARD A POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: 1 DOMESTIC VELOCITY KIT COMPLETE (V5), 1 PRINTER, DESK JET HP3820; 1 MONITOR, GENESIS 17" CUSTOM, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $16,789.22 DAMAGES, $2,025.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $430.00 COSTS, $726.80 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,971.02, 1 SCANNER (V5)-DOMESTIC-VELOCITY; 1 VELOCITY DOMESTIC WORKSTATION; 1 CPU, P4 TOWER D845 GVAD2L; 1 CD DOMESTIC GEN/VEL/VECM/SYSTEM; 1 MEASURING EXTENSION PACKAGE; 1PR2000 SPOT WELDER, WHICH COLLECTIVELY HAS A FAIR MARKET VALUE OF $10,000. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
